channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: MoneyGram's CEO says blockchain works best when customers don't know it's there
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo said that their blockchain strategy has evolved from early experimentation into a broader effort to modernize the company's global payments infrastructure.

item.title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
item.description: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

item.title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
item.description: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
item.description: Morpho Midnight introduces fixed rates and defined maturities alongside Morpho Blue’s variable-rate lending markets.

item.title: Jack Mallers steps down as XXI Capital CEO as Tether's plans to merge three bitcoin firms falls
item.description: The proposed three-way merger between Twenty One Capital, Mallers' Strike, and Elektron Energy has been abandoned.

item.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
item.description: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.

item.title: *BESSENT: FROZE $130M CRYPTO WALLET TIED TO IRAN'S IRGC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9GeUZyeXhlYU9KRGFXOHdzak51dTVvZU4xZWhtR2JxekVGNEdkcjZUNUw0YXFNa2JtTW5SNHpwV2RabjRCekQ0djNXSThJVHd4Z0lmUWtXYllNRkVsUGc?oc=5" target="_blank">*BESSENT: FROZE $130M CRYPTO WALLET TIE…

item.title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
item.description: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

item.title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms may exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
item.description: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
item.description: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

item.title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
item.description: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

item.title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
item.description: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

item.title: Bitcoin rally has broad-based support as institutions, whales, options traders pile in
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 21, 2026

item.title: Clarity odds jump to 43% on Polymarket after unverified reports Trump agreed to ethics deal
item.description: Bettors moved the crypto market structure bill to a 43% chance of passing this year, up from a record low last week, though the reports remain unconfirmed and no bill text has appeared.

item.title: Crypto markets rally on Clarity progress report, Asian chip-stock rebound
item.description: Speculation that President Donald Trump agreed to a crucial ethics provision for the crypto market structure bill underpinned the gains.

item.title: Bitcoin price gains to $66.3K as range breakout attempt sparks 1-month high
item.description: Bitcoin beat out local resistance to pass $66,000 amid predictions of as much as 6% BTC price upside if momentum continued.

item.title: Worldcoin’s WLD Jumps 8% on Grayscale ETF Filing
item.description: The asset manager's S-1 for a spot WLD fund would be the first U.S. ETF tied to Sam Altman's biometric crypto project.

item.title: UK Lawmakers Launch Inquiry Into Crypto Banking Access
item.description: A cross-party group is examining why UK banks block accounts and payments for crypto firms—and whether it's holding the sector back.

item.title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
item.description: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.

item.title: The impulse to change Bitcoin’s rules merely to prevent others from using Bitcoin in ways you disapprove of is statist and alien to a community rooted in liberty, property rights, free markets, natural law, and Austrian economics. BIP 110 would impose monetary - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE53eDRXQ05iWm1hdHN1TWs4d1B3dG5wLUpva0hrLTduQlNkVDNVQVdHYVktUXh1OUtzMDJkeTVTVk95UEIzMzNfQ1lIendGMkFpYVpJT2cwWThISk0?oc=5" target="_blank">The impulse to change Bitcoin’s rules merel…

item.title: 12m crypto followers. 🙏 Crypto is not going away. AI will need to use money. You will need money. 🤷‍♂️ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9qbUxBUzBLVzNJdlVOSEJVQU1wVTJMRzFONGJiUUxTcWZORXpfSlZHR1FSNTlxVTVyemVZQ2dNYmtwV2dQTXBjREdZbE5QWlB4Vk5XaktqVDUxZ1hNa18wVg?oc=5" target="_blank">12m crypto followers. 🙏 Crypto is n…

item.title: If you're wondering why the market is green today: The ethics clause on the CLARITY Act appears to be resolved. That single provision, the conflict-of-interest rule around government officials' crypto holdings, is what held this entire bill hostage for months. Dem - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE10d0w4dkhjb1FqUGVKZlc5RUpZMmJBVzJ5QUVtUTg2S09LZ2VtRDBLQkRCRzJMNk9BSkFXVkc3WDlMZnJmM2F1NEFpVlRMMnc2NS1RR2w5VG92RWVx?oc=5" target="_blank">If you're wondering why the market is gree…

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post 5-day inflow streak, longest since May
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $227 million in inflows as BTC climbed above $65,000, extending their longest winning streak since early May.

item.title: XRP jumps 4% as traders watch 'triangle breakout' toward $1.35
item.description: XRP pushed higher over 24 hours and tested short-term resistance, but the larger chart still needs a clean break above the $1.24-$1.28 supply zone to confirm a stronger reversal.

item.title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
item.description: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin rises to five-week high above $66,400 on rising hope for Clarity Act
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs have pulled in roughly $727 million over the past week, the most sustained stretch of buying since the record outflows of June.

item.title: BlockSec: Wanchain Cardano Bridge Reportedly Exploited, 515M NIGHT Drained BlockSec's Phalcon said Wanchain's Cardano bridge was reportedly exploited, with approximately 515 million NIGHT drained from the bridge treasury. Initial analysis suggests t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9XUFhpQ2N1V3RhVGNJdUlma3EyR0pnSVJ2Ui1QaFZqRkdVYmZnMjlhd1c3bFVQZ29HYzJsMktnSlF3S3p3bE1nNTlIZndNR1d1STRxUXJEZkptVWNETWRfWXJ3NA?oc=5" target="_blank">BlockSec: Wanchain Cardano Bridg…

item.title: UK Parliament begins inquiry into banking chokepoint for crypto businesses
item.description: The U.K.’s Crypto and Digital Assets All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) is focused on banks that refused crypto firms accounts or introduced restrictions on crypto transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin hits one-month high above $66,000 as the chip trade turns back into a tailwind
item.description: Asian semiconductor shares rebounded hard, a five-day ETF inflow streak passed $600 million, and oil pulled back on Middle East diplomacy.

item.title: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
item.description: The filing expands Grayscale’s growing lineup of crypto-related exchange-traded products outside of Bitcoin and Ether.

item.title: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
item.description: The settlements add to former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky’s $10 million FTC settlement in April.

item.title: Binance & OKX users face $1,900 fines in Vietnam, Coinbase in China? Asia Express
item.description: Retail users in Vietnam who trade on offshore crypto exchanges like Binance or OKX face heavy penalties. Network School controversy in Malaysia over Israeli citizen ban.

item.title: Trump Agrees to Ethics Provision, Clearing Key Hurdle for CLARITY Act According to The Block, US President Donald Trump has agreed to an ethics provision in the CLARITY Act, removing the final major hurdle to advancing the crypto market structure bill tow - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5jbDdkQk9iR2JBbm5jVDE1U0RFZ1lmVk1kWjlsTWJxQnpuVTVjalpsblhXUlVPbEc1QjlENjhsMHJUaG1BdTRwNTVKeVhiZ0FSZEVPSW5CRDlXZVZmWF80VFV1dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Trump Agrees to Ethics Provision…

item.title: London Stock Exchange eyes overnight trading launch in 2027: FT
item.description: The move comes as traditional exchanges face growing competition from crypto markets and tokenized equity platforms that offer around-the-clock trading.

item.title: On crypto - Moreno told me this evening that "The president has agreed to the most aggressive ethics language in the history of the United States." "It’s up to Democrats whether they want to accept yes for an answer," he added. D's and R's plan to meet on bill t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1vMmx0NGVKQnNQeHd2VG15QlZEa2Uwa3A4MHdab2U1akwxTHAxLTBadjlHNzFrNV9pdERoT2pCWW94WnZTNGZHV3JibzFzYkxvaU1fTVZrd2M0N0k4TUZkMw?oc=5" target="_blank">On crypto - Moreno told me this even…

item.title: Patrick Witt defers military training as CLARITY heads to Senate
item.description: The decision keeps the administration’s chief crypto policy negotiator in place during what could be a decisive few weeks for the CLARITY Act.

item.title: Democrats added certain consumer protection rules to CLARITY: Coinbase exec
item.description: Coinbase vice chair Ryan VanGrack said that Democratic lawmakers had added provisions on customer protection to a digital asset market structure bill under consideration in the US Senate.

item.title: Tether Gold recognized as Accepted Spot Commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
item.description: The recognition allows regulated firms in Abu Dhabi Global Market to offer services involving Tether Gold as tokenized commodities gain broader adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin defies recent tech stocks sell-off: Are bulls eyeing $70K rally?
item.description: Despite muted derivatives sentiment, Bitcoin’s decoupling and Strategy’s cash raise set the stage for a potential rally to $70,000.

item.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
item.description: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

item.title: SEC sues Mining Automatic and founder over alleged $22M crypto mining scheme
item.description: The SEC alleges Mining Automatic and its founder raised $22 million from investors by promising guaranteed crypto mining returns while spending only a fraction of the funds on mining operations.

item.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
item.description: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

item.title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
item.description: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
item.description: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.

item.title: I wouldn't be surprised to see a rally of #Bitcoin towards $80,000-85,000 from here. That would coincide with the 50-Week MA, and that's usually the resistance point of the first rally after the bear market has ended. I expect this to happen over the next 2-3 mont - x.com

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
item.description: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

item.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
item.description: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs continued inflows for a second week last week, totaling $75.7 million. This marks the second consecutive positive week following eight weeks of outflows. 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9MUk9KOHotNm1TV1FBUWpFZHp2TEEwYkh3V2tDLUtwcnRWdW1KUmFOU05uMHJZaUlIQnJQaHdLb3JVYWItS2JpQ2txU2JDcm0ySzlrTFZ6RlNkdGRHOE5XcXZQQVZzVlU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. spot Bit…

item.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
item.description: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

item.title: Something here apparently triggered the crypto spammers & trolls. This has NOTHING to do with a coin or NFT. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE4yQ2hCWmhMbXpSVEd1ek5VbzJFNmtXUlVMSEpLM2NkRXc3SFhxOXo5bDJNZER6S0VkZ1M0MTYtRVcySUVEQTlnYXBDbnJkQmk2SW9rMWZPY29RQ1hkRXpzMnZGNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Something here apparently trigge…

item.title: James Wynn lost $100 Million day trading Bitcoin in May-June last year. Now, he’s refilled his account and is shorting the S&P500. He is already down 50%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9YLXZldUZYZ0NWY25OUGR6WV9WRGhHNlFabnZseG5kZ1VtREpSLWJuNy02eDNIRkVGbEtNR25Dc1hrZzE1VjJCTjdualR6V05LZWVEZEhoZWpvMjA?oc=5" target="_blank">James Wynn lost $100 Million day trading Bi…

item.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
item.description: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

item.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
item.description: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

item.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
item.description: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

item.title: Equities and options live now. Crypto and more on the way. Free for all US-based Robinhood customers. Connect your agent here → rbnhd.co/AgenticTrading… Learn more here → robinhood.com/us/en/agentic-… Options are risky and not appropriate for all i - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia's State Duma to consider bill to regulate Bitcoin & crypto tomorrow, TASS reports 👀 "Tomorrow we'll be passing the law in its second and third readings. It's aimed at creating the legal conditions for cryptocurrencies to function in our country - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA3V21fSFQ1WTE2ajdGM3NBaDJNb0tXeEYyU2Y0amlnUmQyeGtKTkhmaG8tSE1yNWh1Y0dDdXZOSjI1OUtSMy1yV3FPWlNra2ZVTTJzT3Z0YTRGbUlUZlRaNXZGOEc2RVk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia's Stat…

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
item.description: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

item.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
item.description: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.
